Precision-machined chain sprockets in simplex, duplex, and triplex configurations. Available in pilot bore, taper bushing, and finished bore styles for all standard chain sizes.
Precision CNC machined teeth for smooth chain engagement
Available in C45 steel, stainless steel, and engineering plastics
Hardened teeth option (HRC 45-55) for extended wear life
Pilot bore, Taper bushing, Finished bore

Guangjin sprockets are manufactured to the highest standards using CNC machining centers with hobbing, shaping, or milling processes depending on the size and quantity.

## Tooth Profile

All sprockets conform to ISO 606 and ANSI B29.1 standards for chain engagement geometry. The tooth profile is optimized for:
- Smooth roller engagement and disengagement
- Even load distribution across multiple teeth
- Reduced noise and vibration at high speeds
- Maximum chain/sprocket service life

## Custom Sprockets

We manufacture custom sprockets to your drawings or samples. Specify your bore diameter, keyway dimensions, set screw positions, and any special hub configuration.

Integrated gear motor combining a high-efficiency electric motor with precision gearbox in one compact unit. Plug-and-play solution for conveyors, packaging, and automation.
Integrated motor and gearbox — compact, ready to install
Available with AC induction, brake, and inverter-duty motors
Multiple gearbox types: worm, helical, and planetary

Guangjin gear motors are fully integrated drive solutions — motor and gearbox matched, assembled, and tested as a single unit. This eliminates the complexity of sourcing and coupling separate components.

## Integrated Design Benefits

- **Simplified Procurement** — One part number instead of three (motor, gearbox, coupling)
- **Guaranteed Compatibility** — Motor and gearbox engineered together
- **Reduced Assembly Time** — Bolt-on installation, pre-aligned
- **Compact Footprint** — Shorter overall length than coupled solutions
- **Lower Maintenance** — Fewer wearing parts, single lubrication point

## Motor Options

We offer gear motors with:

- **Standard AC Motors** — IE3 premium efficiency, 2/4/6 pole
- **Brake Motors** — DC or AC electromagnetic brake, fail-safe
- **Inverter-Duty Motors** — For VFD speed control, Class F insulation with Class B rise
- **Single-Phase Motors** — For locations without three-phase power

## Quality Testing

Each gear motor undergoes a 40-point inspection including no-load current, vibration analysis, temperature rise, and load testing before shipment.

Elastomeric jaw coupling for connecting electric motors to pumps, gearboxes, and other driven machinery. Absorbs shock, vibration, and minor misalignment.
Elastomeric spider element absorbs shock and vibration
Compensates for angular, parallel, and axial misalignment
Fail-safe design — spider fails before connected equipment

Jaw couplings are the workhorse of industrial power transmission — simple, reliable, and cost-effective. The three-piece design consists of two metal hubs and a replaceable elastomeric spider.

## Spider Options

- **NBR (Nitrile Rubber)** — Standard material, good damping, -40°C to +80°C
- **Polyurethane (PU)** — Higher torque capacity, better chemical resistance
- **Hytrel (TPE)** — High temperature to +120°C, excellent fatigue life

## Misalignment Tolerance

| Type | NBR Spider | PU/Hytrel Spider |
|------|-----------|------------------|
| Angular | 1.0° | 0.5° |
| Parallel | 0.38 mm | 0.25 mm |
| Axial | ±1.0 mm | ±0.5 mm |

This makes jaw couplings ideal for standard motor-pump and motor-gearbox connections where perfect alignment is impractical.

K series helical bevel gearbox combining helical and bevel gear stages in a compact right-angle configuration. High torque capacity with universal mounting flexibility.
Right-angle power transmission with helical-bevel gearing
Universal housing design — mount in any orientation
High-strength cast iron housing for heavy-duty applications
Integrated backstop and torque arm options
Hollow shaft with shrink disc for easy installation

The K series helical bevel gearbox combines the efficiency of helical gearing with the directional flexibility of bevel gears, delivering right-angle power transmission without the efficiency losses typical of worm gearboxes.

## Right-Angle Design

The bevel gear stage provides a precise 90° turn in the power flow, enabling motor and driven shaft to be mounted perpendicular to each other. This saves significant installation space compared to inline arrangements.

## Universal Housing

The K series is famous for its universal housing design — a single gearbox can be mounted in any of six orientations (M1 through M6) without modification. Mounting feet, flanges, and shaft positions are fully interchangeable, dramatically reducing inventory requirements.

## Robust Construction

The HT250 cast iron housing provides excellent vibration damping and structural rigidity. Combined with oversized bearings, this makes the K series ideal for demanding applications such as:

- Bucket elevators and belt conveyors handling shock loads
- Crane trolley and bridge drives
- Heavy-duty mixers and agitators
- Industrial washing systems with frequent reversing

NMRV series aluminum housing worm gearbox featuring compact design, high efficiency, and versatile mounting options. Ideal for conveyor systems, packaging machinery, and industrial automation applications.
Aluminum alloy housing — lightweight and corrosion-resistant
Hardened and ground worm shaft for extended service life
Multiple mounting positions: foot, flange, or shaft mounted
Quiet operation with smooth power transmission
IEC Flange, NEMA Flange, Solid Shaft

The NMRV series worm gearbox is our flagship product, engineered for reliable performance in industrial and commercial applications. Combining a robust worm gear mechanism with a lightweight aluminum housing, this gearbox delivers exceptional torque in a compact footprint.

## Design Features

The NMRV worm gearbox features a precision-ground worm shaft made from case-hardened alloy steel, meshing with a high-quality bronze worm wheel. This combination ensures smooth, quiet operation and excellent wear resistance.

The die-cast aluminum housing provides superior heat dissipation while keeping the unit lightweight — a critical advantage in mobile equipment and space-constrained installations.

## Applications

NMRV worm gearboxes are widely used across industries:

- **Conveyor Systems** — Speed reduction and torque multiplication for belt, roller, and chain conveyors
- **Packaging Machinery** — Precise indexing and positioning in filling, capping, and labeling machines
- **Food Processing** — Stainless steel output shaft options for washdown environments
- **Material Handling** — Lifts, hoists, and palletizers
- **Automation** — Servo-driven positioning systems requiring backlash control

## Mounting Flexibility

One of the NMRV's key advantages is its mounting versatility. Available in foot-mounted, flange-mounted, and shaft-mounted configurations, it adapts to virtually any installation requirement without complex adapter plates.

## Quality Standards

Every NMRV gearbox undergoes 100% testing before shipment, including noise level checks, temperature rise monitoring, and load testing. We use high-grade NSK/SKF bearings and premium lubricants to ensure long service intervals.

R series inline helical gearbox with high efficiency up to 96% per stage. Hardened helical gears for quiet, reliable power transmission in industrial drives, pumps, and mixers.
High efficiency helical gearing — up to 96% per stage
Compact inline design for space-saving installation
Available in single, double, and triple reduction stages

The R series helical gearbox represents the standard for efficiency in industrial power transmission. Using precision helical gearing, it achieves efficiency levels unmatched by worm gear designs, making it the preferred choice for continuous-duty applications.

## Helical Gear Advantages

Unlike worm gearboxes that rely on sliding contact, helical gears mesh with rolling contact, dramatically reducing friction losses. This means less heat generation, lower energy consumption, and the ability to handle higher power densities in a given frame size.

Each gear is manufactured from high-grade alloy steel (20CrMnTi), case-hardened to HRC 58-62, and profile-ground to DIN 5 precision.

## Modular Construction

The R series follows a modular design philosophy, allowing us to combine standard components into thousands of configurations. Common add-ons include:

- Input flange adapters for IEC/NEMA motors
- Solid shaft, hollow shaft, or shrink disc output
- Backstop devices
- Torque arms
- Oil expansion tanks

## Typical Applications

R series helical gearboxes excel in:

- **Pump Drives** — Continuous operation with minimal maintenance
- **Agitators & Mixers** — High torque at low speeds for chemical and food processing
- **Crane Travel Drives** — Reliable performance under frequent starts and stops
- **Extruders** — Handles high axial and radial loads

S series foot-mounted helical-worm gearbox for heavy-duty industrial applications. High torque density with robust cast iron housing and optional cooling systems.
Helical-worm combination for high ratios in compact size
HT250 cast iron housing with reinforced ribbing
Oversized bearings for high overhung load capacity
Options: cooling fan, oil pump, backstop

The S series industrial gearbox combines a helical input stage with a worm output stage, achieving high reduction ratios while maintaining a compact footprint. This configuration provides the cost advantages of worm gearing with improved efficiency from the helical primary stage.

## Heavy-Duty Design

The HT250 cast iron housing features extensive ribbing for heat dissipation and structural stiffness. All shafts run on high-quality tapered roller bearings rated for combined radial and axial loads, making the S series suitable for demanding applications such as conveyor drives in mining and quarrying.

## Cooling Options

For continuous-duty applications, the S series can be equipped with:
- External cooling fan with aluminum shroud
- Oil cooler with circulation pump
- Forced air cooling package

These options extend the thermal power rating by 30-60% compared to natural cooling.

V-belt pulleys with taper bush mounting system for easy installation and removal. Available in SPZ, SPA, SPB, and SPC profiles for industrial belt drives.
Taper bush system — fast mounting, self-centering
Cast iron GG25 construction, dynamically balanced
SPZ, SPA, SPB, SPC, Z, A, B, C, D

The taper bush pulley system represents the industry standard for industrial V-belt drives. The split taper bush provides a mechanical interference fit on the shaft without the need for keyway damage or shaft galling.

## Taper Bush Advantages

- **Quick Installation** — Slide on, tighten screws, done
- **Self-Centering** — Automatic concentricity without shimming
- **Easy Removal** — Loosen screws, use jacking holes to release
- **Interchangeable** — Change bore size by swapping bushes only

## Balancing

All pulleys are dynamically balanced to ISO 1940 Grade G6.3 as standard. Grade G2.5 balancing is available for high-speed applications above 3,000 rpm.
